title: Add Deals King & Radar Ai to business
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: Radar locked on deals
gist.blurb: A new app has sprouted in the greenhouse! Deals King & Radar Ai is now live, helping you spot the best deals with AI-powered radar.
gist.summary: Added Deals King & Radar Ai to the community apps showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and explore Deals King & Radar Ai in the community greenhouse.
gist.visual_concept: The PR adds an app called 'Deals King & Radar Ai'. Visual symbols include a king's crown and a radar screen. Polly the bee interacting with a retro radar setup in the garden.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny king's crown, looking at a glowing retro radar screen that displays pixelated shopping bags. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
